title: agropyron pauciflorum subsp. novae-angliae
intro: Agropyron pauciflorum subsp. novae-angliae, also known as Slender Wheat Grass, is a subspecies of grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Slender Wheat Grass include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
